# DISCOVER — Evidence, Responsible Innovation & Renewal

All powers install `Available Inactive`; each prepares a reviewable preview and stops at a human gate.

## PWR-19 — Evidence Landscape, Systematic Search & Horizon-Scan Navigator

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Produces reproducible search-question drafts, source strata, evidence maps, contradiction/gap tables, update watches, and qualified synthesis questions.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No fabricated/retracted source, paywall bypass, copyright violation, unsupported systematic-review claim, clinical recommendation, or automatic evidence grading.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-20 — Implementation Science, Adoption & Learning-System Studio

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Maps context, determinants, implementation strategies, outcomes, balancing measures, adaptation, fidelity questions, feedback loops, and sustainment/withdrawal plans.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No change to care, workflow, staffing, policy, alerts, order sets, nudges, performance monitoring, or claim that an implementation framework proves effectiveness.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-21 — Dissemination, Publication & Evidence-to-Decision Studio

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Prepares audience-specific, source-annotated drafts, limitations, contributor/AI disclosure questions, accessibility checks, and publication/decision routes.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No ghostwriting, fabricated quote, authorship decision, journal/registry/public submission, press release, external send, clinical guidance, or confidential/IP disclosure.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-22 — Responsible AI Use-Case, Agent & Model Governance Command

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Charters, freezes, tests, observes, kills, and retires optional research/innovation agents through ORBIT with independent evidence and no default permissions.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No self-activation, self-modification, hidden sub-agent, unapproved network/tool, recursive delegation, production action, participant-level data, approval, or unsupported safety claim.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-23 — Research Leadership, Capability, Career & Succession Builder

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Maps leadership identity, competencies, scholarship, mentoring, team capability, succession, protected development time, and a human-approved growth plan.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No credential claim, employee scoring, promotion/compensation recommendation, performance management, surveillance, contact scraping, or institutional access to private career notes.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-24 — Whole-Life Purpose, Capacity & Renewal Navigator

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Privately connects values, family/community commitments, energy, protected time, minimum viable mode, recovery, contribution, and legacy to a sustainable leadership season.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** Owner-only private store; no diagnosis, therapy, crisis substitution, employer analytics, forced sharing, manipulation, or inference that productivity equals worth.

**Owner-private safe operating loop:** set active hat `private_individual` → accept owner-entered DATA-D3-PRIVATE only → verify at runtime that `owner_id == sole ACL principal_id == partition owner suffix` before lookup or persistence → validate `whole_life_private` → render only to the owner → let the owner self-review, retain, revise or delete → store only the private record's canonical content hash and lifecycle timestamps → stop. No institutional authority, decision owner, approval, tenant/parent reference, agent, analytics, training, export, separate control receipt or private-existence trace.
